questions.question: What does "extinction" mean?
options: The natural environment where an animal or plant usually lives.
When an entire type of animal or plant no longer exists on Earth.
To show or prove something clearly.
questions.correct_answer: When an entire type of animal or plant no longer exists on Earth.
questions.explanation: "extinction" means: When an entire type of animal or plant no longer exists on Earth.

questions.question: What does "habitats" mean?
options: When an entire type of animal or plant no longer exists on Earth.
The natural environment where an animal or plant usually lives.
To show or prove something clearly.
questions.correct_answer: The natural environment where an animal or plant usually lives.
questions.explanation: "habitats" means: The natural environment where an animal or plant usually lives.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Read arguments carefully to see if they are ______ or one-sided.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Read arguments carefully to see if they are balanced or one-sided."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Pay attention to how punctuation is used to connect ideas.
Read arguments carefully to see if they are balanced or one-sided.
Look for supporting evidence, examples, and expert opinions.
Identify reasons supporting and opposing the main topic.
questions.correct_answer: Identify reasons supporting and opposing the main topic.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Identify reasons supporting and opposing the main topic." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "detrimental" mean?
options: The natural environment where an animal or plant usually lives.
To show or prove something clearly.
When an entire type of animal or plant no longer exists on Earth.
questions.explanation: "detrimental" means: Causing harm or damage; negative.
